name: nuclear-grade
description: Risk-graded context engineering for AI-assisted software work — a catalog of agent skills, paste-ready command prompts, and change-record templates that keep agent work questioned, controlled, and reviewable.

capabilities: Risk-graded agent skills that auto-surface by their description
Paste-ready command prompts for planning, review, and change records
Change-record templates and a repo-side ng CLI (run from a checkout)
Cross-tool install guidance for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and VS Code
defaultPrompt: Use Nuclear-grade to plan this change.
Check this PR for evidence gaps.
Create a change record for this work.
